# Benzene

---
execute:
  echo: false
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
    code-summary: "Show the code"
---

```{r echo = F, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE,fig.height=8, fig.width=10}

# set parameter
characteristic <- "Benzene"

# source static regulatory criteria boxplot function
source("functions/static_boxplot_function.R")

# Render plots directly in chunk — htmlwidgets must be output from direct chunk
# code in Quarto; printing inside source() is not captured for widget output.
if (knitr::is_html_output()) {
  htmltools::tagList(
    plotly::ggplotly(plots$tributary_plot, tooltip = "text", height = 700) |> clean_plotly_legend(),
    plotly::ggplotly(plots$river_mile_plot, tooltip = "text", height = 550) |> clean_plotly_legend()
  )
} else {
  print(plots$tributary_plot)
  print(plots$river_mile_plot)
}

# source table download function
source("functions/table_download.R")
download_tbl(char = characteristic)

# source threshold table function
source("functions/threshold_table.R")
show_threshold_table(characteristic)

```
